name: Bitty!George Harrison
description:
This a continuation of the Beatles Bitty AU I started with Ringo Starr!

The bitty idea/AU is not mine! To my knowledge it belongs to Jaw29!

The credit to the art on the profile is ‘taepomme’ on Tumblr!

As of when this is published- Ringo, Pattie, John, nor Paul’s personality’s have been added, so if you choose a route to have them in be wary until I update again!🩷

-January 29/26
creator: Raemondisnotafairy
